Circle definitions, Chords, Angles subtended by arcs, Cyclic quadrilaterals

Proofs using Euclid's axioms for triangles/quadrilaterals/circles

formative_content_refs.title: Geometric Constructions

practicals.title: Lab Practical (Mathematics Laboratory)
practicals.source_text: Lab activities to be done from the prescribed books. Prescribed Books: Mathematics - Textbook for class IX, Guidelines for Mathematics Laboratory in Schools, class IX, Laboratory Manual - Mathematics

activities.title: Geometric Constructions and Manipulation Activities
activities.source_text: Constructing a square with a given side as described in the Baudhayana's Sulbasutras; Construct different geometrical shapes like bisectors of line segments, angles and their bisectors, triangles, and other polygons. Engage in drawing, measurement and paper manipulation activities to discover geometric patterns involving triangles and 4-gons.

activities.title: Square Root Spiral Construction
activities.source_text: Construct the square root spiral. Apply computational thinking to represent rational and irrational numbers through algorithms and visual models.

activities.title: Tower of Hanoi Puzzle
activities.source_text: Solve the Tower of Hanoi puzzle. Use computational thinking to identify patterns, write step-by-step rules.

activities.title: Fractal Analysis using GP
activities.source_text: Analyse attributes of fractals using Geometric Progressions. Visualise a GP graphically.

activities.title: Floor Plan Representation
activities.source_text: Represent a floor plan on a grid using coordinates.

projects.title: Continuous and Holistic Assessment Projects
projects.source_text: Projects, activities, and investigations form an integral part of the learning process. Portfolio (05 Marks) is a component of Internal Assessment.

marks_distribution: - Pen Paper Test and Multiple Assessment: 10 Marks
teacher_notes: Curriculum redesigned in alignment with NEP 2020 and NCF-SE 2023.
Prioritize deep conceptual understanding, logical reasoning, and competency-based education over rote learning.
Integrate Indian Knowledge System (e.g., Baudhayana's Sulbasutras, Brahmagupta, Aryabhata) with contemporary knowledge.
Focus on real-life applications, experiential learning, and cross-disciplinary contexts.
Emphasis on computational thinking: breaking down problems into sub-problems, algorithmic problem-solving, and visualisation.
Assessment includes formative components (projects, activities, investigations) alongside summative examinations.
